Metadata.siteDescription: Smart docs and AI writing workspace — ship faster, stress less.

Marketing.footer: Moyu AI · powered by HeroUI & Next.js

whatIsToken.heading: What is token
whatIsToken.intro: Tokens are the basic units large language models use to process text. Both reading input and generating output are measured in tokens.

bullets.conversion: 100 tokens are roughly 75 English words, or about 50 Chinese characters.
bullets.usage: Both input (prompt) and output (completion) count toward token usage.

whatIsLimit.heading: What is token limit
whatIsLimit.p1: Token limit caps how much AI you can use — it helps control cost and keep the service stable. Every registered user gets an allowance.
whatIsLimit.p2: Your balance can refill automatically on a schedule, or you can claim more manually when you are below the cap.

rules.monthly: On the 1st of each month, reset to {limit} tokens if your balance is below that amount.
rules.weekly: Claim {amount} tokens manually each week when your balance is below {cap}.

claim.status: Your token limit is {balance}, last updated at {updatedAt}

ErrorPage.title: Moyu AI · Something went wrong
ErrorPage.description: Please try again later or return home.

NotFound.description: This link may be broken, or the address has a typo.
